scope.note: ENTITY ONLY request. Selected exact-name institutional/entity duplicates with matching canonical entity names and compatible entity types/acronyms; ambiguous community-board, person, role, corridor, route, project, and treatment records were excluded.

proposed_aliases.reason: Same global entity. Both records identify MTA Bridges and Tunnels; the alias carries acronym B&T and source text naming Triborough Bridge and Tunnel Authority as MTA Bridges and Tunnels, while the target is the broader canonical MTA Bridges and Tunnels agency record.
Same global entity. Both records use the canonical entity name MTA Bridges and Tunnels and compatible B&T/MTA B&T acronyms; the target has the richer agency record and broader source support.

Same global entity. The alias and target both identify MTA Bridges and Tunnels; the alias additionally carries Triborough Bridge and Tunnel Authority as agency_name, which is consistent with the target's MTA B&T agency identity.

Same global entity. Both records carry entity_name MTA Bridges and Tunnels with compatible B&T/MTA B&T acronym context; the alias is typed as a business unit but points to the same MTA Bridges and Tunnels organization.
Same global entity. Both records carry the exact legal entity_name Metro-North Commuter Railroad Company; the target is the richer MTA Metro-North Railroad agency record.
Same global entity. Both records identify Metro-North Commuter Railroad Company / MTA Metro-North Railroad, with exact legal entity_name agreement and compatible agency typing.
Same global entity. Both records carry exact entity_name Metro-North Commuter Railroad Company; the alias is a thin company record and the target is the fuller agency record.
Same global entity. Both records identify Metro-North Commuter Railroad Company / MTA Metro-North Railroad, with exact legal entity_name agreement and matching MNR agency context.

Same global entity. Both records carry exact legal entity_name Metro-North Commuter Railroad Company and MTA Metro-North Railroad naming; subsidiary typing is compatible with the target agency record.
Same global entity. Both records carry exact legal entity_name The Long Island Rail Road Company and MTA Long Island Rail Road naming; the target is the richer LIRR subsidiary record.

alias.entity_name: The Long Island Rail Road Company

target.entity_name: The Long Island Rail Road Company

candidate_discovery.command: sqlite3 -header -column data/canonical.db "with e as (select r.record_id, r.display_name, lower(trim(coalesce(e.entity_name,e.agency_name,e.name,e.short_name,r.display_name))) as key, coalesce(e.entity_type,'') as entity_type, coalesce(e.acronym,'') as acronym, r.primary_source_id from records r join entities e on e.record_id=r.record_id where r.record_kind='entity' and key != '' and r.record_id not in (select alias from identity_aliases where kind='entity') and r.record_id not in (select target from identity_aliases where kind='entity')) select key, count(*) as n, group_concat(record_id, ' | ') as ids, group_concat(entity_type, ' | ') as types from e group by key having n>1 order by n desc, key limit 200;"
candidate_discovery.result_summary: Exact-name entity duplicate groups were inspected. Selected candidates came from high-confidence institutional groups: MTA Bridges and Tunnels, Metro-North Commuter Railroad Company, and The Long Island Rail Road Company. Ambiguous same-label groups such as community boards, people, roles, and generic committees were skipped.

record_existence_and_kind.command: sqlite3 -header -column data/canonical.db "select r.record_id, r.record_kind, r.display_name, coalesce(e.entity_name,'') as entity_name, coalesce(e.agency_name,'') as agency_name, coalesce(e.name,'') as name, coalesce(e.short_name,'') as short_name, coalesce(e.acronym,'') as acronym, coalesce(e.entity_type,'') as entity_type, r.primary_source_id, (select count(*) from record_sources rs where rs.record_id=r.record_id) as source_count from records r join entities e on r.record_id=e.record_id where r.record_id in ('entity_meeting-doc-72551-mta-bridges-tunnels','entity_mta-bridges-and-tunnels','entity_mta-bridges-tunnels','entity_mta-bridges-tunnels-201103','entity_mta-cd-bridges-tunnels-163236','entity_meeting-doc-124881-mnr','entity_meeting-doc-160141-metro-north-commuter-railroad','entity_meeting-doc-179691-metro-north','entity_meeting-doc-194101-mncrr','entity_meeting-doc-39661-mnr','entity_mnr-meeting-doc-131666','entity_annual-report-2021-lirr','entity_lirr-meeting-doc-131666') order by r.record_id;"
record_existence_and_kind.count_command: sqlite3 data/canonical.db "select count(*) from records where record_kind='entity' and record_id in ('entity_meeting-doc-72551-mta-bridges-tunnels','entity_mta-bridges-and-tunnels','entity_mta-bridges-tunnels','entity_mta-bridges-tunnels-201103','entity_mta-cd-bridges-tunnels-163236','entity_meeting-doc-124881-mnr','entity_meeting-doc-160141-metro-north-commuter-railroad','entity_meeting-doc-179691-metro-north','entity_meeting-doc-194101-mncrr','entity_meeting-doc-39661-mnr','entity_mnr-meeting-doc-131666','entity_annual-report-2021-lirr','entity_lirr-meeting-doc-131666');"
record_existence_and_kind.result_summary: 13/13 selected alias and target records exist as record_kind=entity. The selected pairs have exact canonical entity_name agreement within their groups: MTA Bridges and Tunnels, Metro-North Commuter Railroad Company, and The Long Island Rail Road Company.

existing_alias_conflicts.merges_json_command: for id in entity_meeting-doc-72551-mta-bridges-tunnels entity_mta-bridges-tunnels entity_mta-bridges-tunnels-201103 entity_mta-cd-bridges-tunnels-163236 entity_meeting-doc-160141-metro-north-commuter-railroad entity_meeting-doc-179691-metro-north entity_meeting-doc-194101-mncrr entity_meeting-doc-39661-mnr entity_mnr-meeting-doc-131666 entity_lirr-meeting-doc-131666; do jq -r --arg id "$id" '(.aliases["entity"][$id] // empty) | $id + " -> " + .' data/identity-overrides/merges.json; done
existing_alias_conflicts.merges_json_result: no output; none of the proposed aliases are already present in data/identity-overrides/merges.json
existing_alias_conflicts.identity_aliases_command: sqlite3 -header -column data/canonical.db "select kind, alias, target from identity_aliases where kind='entity' and alias in ('entity_meeting-doc-72551-mta-bridges-tunnels','entity_mta-bridges-tunnels','entity_mta-bridges-tunnels-201103','entity_mta-cd-bridges-tunnels-163236','entity_meeting-doc-160141-metro-north-commuter-railroad','entity_meeting-doc-179691-metro-north','entity_meeting-doc-194101-mncrr','entity_meeting-doc-39661-mnr','entity_mnr-meeting-doc-131666','entity_lirr-meeting-doc-131666');"
existing_alias_conflicts.identity_aliases_result: no output; none of the proposed aliases are already present in canonical identity_aliases
existing_alias_conflicts.target_alias_guard_command: for id in entity_mta-bridges-and-tunnels entity_meeting-doc-124881-mnr entity_annual-report-2021-lirr; do jq -r --arg id "$id" '(.aliases["entity"][$id] // empty) | $id + " -> " + .' data/identity-overrides/merges.json; done; sqlite3 -header -column data/canonical.db "select kind, alias, target from identity_aliases where kind='entity' and alias in ('entity_mta-bridges-and-tunnels','entity_meeting-doc-124881-mnr','entity_annual-report-2021-lirr');"
existing_alias_conflicts.target_alias_guard_result: no output; selected targets are not themselves registered aliases in merges.json or canonical identity_aliases

do_not_merge_conflicts.db_command: sqlite3 -header -column data/canonical.db "with pairs(alias,target) as (values ('entity_meeting-doc-72551-mta-bridges-tunnels','entity_mta-bridges-and-tunnels'),('entity_mta-bridges-tunnels','entity_mta-bridges-and-tunnels'),('entity_mta-bridges-tunnels-201103','entity_mta-bridges-and-tunnels'),('entity_mta-cd-bridges-tunnels-163236','entity_mta-bridges-and-tunnels'),('entity_meeting-doc-160141-metro-north-commuter-railroad','entity_meeting-doc-124881-mnr'),('entity_meeting-doc-179691-metro-north','entity_meeting-doc-124881-mnr'),('entity_meeting-doc-194101-mncrr','entity_meeting-doc-124881-mnr'),('entity_meeting-doc-39661-mnr','entity_meeting-doc-124881-mnr'),('entity_mnr-meeting-doc-131666','entity_meeting-doc-124881-mnr'),('entity_lirr-meeting-doc-131666','entity_annual-report-2021-lirr')) select d.* from do_not_merge d join pairs p on d.kind='entity' and ((d.record_id_a=p.alias and d.record_id_b=p.target) or (d.record_id_a=p.target and d.record_id_b=p.alias));"
do_not_merge_conflicts.db_result: no output; no selected pair is present in canonical do_not_merge
do_not_merge_conflicts.json_command: jq -r '.pairs["entity"][]? | select((.record_ids | index("entity_meeting-doc-72551-mta-bridges-tunnels") and index("entity_mta-bridges-and-tunnels")) or (.record_ids | index("entity_mta-bridges-tunnels") and index("entity_mta-bridges-and-tunnels")) or (.record_ids | index("entity_mta-bridges-tunnels-201103") and index("entity_mta-bridges-and-tunnels")) or (.record_ids | index("entity_mta-cd-bridges-tunnels-163236") and index("entity_mta-bridges-and-tunnels")) or (.record_ids | index("entity_meeting-doc-160141-metro-north-commuter-railroad") and index("entity_meeting-doc-124881-mnr")) or (.record_ids | index("entity_meeting-doc-179691-metro-north") and index("entity_meeting-doc-124881-mnr")) or (.record_ids | index("entity_meeting-doc-194101-mncrr") and index("entity_meeting-doc-124881-mnr")) or (.record_ids | index("entity_meeting-doc-39661-mnr") and index("entity_meeting-doc-124881-mnr")) or (.record_ids | index("entity_mnr-meeting-doc-131666") and index("entity_meeting-doc-124881-mnr")) or (.record_ids | index("entity_lirr-meeting-doc-131666") and index("entity_annual-report-2021-lirr"))) | .record_ids | @tsv' data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json
do_not_merge_conflicts.json_result: no output; no selected pair is present in data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json

prior_prep_conflicts_through_identity111.command: for f in data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch0*-prep.json data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch10[0-9]-prep.json data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch11[0-1]-prep.json; do jq -r --arg f "$f" '.proposed_aliases[]? | select(.kind=="entity") | select(["entity_meeting-doc-72551-mta-bridges-tunnels","entity_mta-bridges-tunnels","entity_mta-bridges-tunnels-201103","entity_mta-cd-bridges-tunnels-163236","entity_meeting-doc-160141-metro-north-commuter-railroad","entity_meeting-doc-179691-metro-north","entity_meeting-doc-194101-mncrr","entity_meeting-doc-39661-mnr","entity_mnr-meeting-doc-131666","entity_lirr-meeting-doc-131666"] | index(.alias_id)) | [$f,.kind,.alias_id,.target_id] | @tsv' "$f" 2>/dev/null; done
prior_prep_conflicts_through_identity111.result: no output; none of the proposed aliases appear in prior codex identity prep artifacts through batch111

source_evidence_spot_check.command: for id in entity_meeting-doc-72551-mta-bridges-tunnels entity_mta-bridges-and-tunnels entity_mta-bridges-tunnels entity_mta-bridges-tunnels-201103 entity_mta-cd-bridges-tunnels-163236 entity_meeting-doc-124881-mnr entity_meeting-doc-160141-metro-north-commuter-railroad entity_meeting-doc-179691-metro-north entity_meeting-doc-194101-mncrr entity_meeting-doc-39661-mnr entity_mnr-meeting-doc-131666 entity_annual-report-2021-lirr entity_lirr-meeting-doc-131666; do jq -r --arg id "$id" 'select(.record_id==$id) | [.record_id,(.payload.entity_name // .payload.agency_name // .payload.name // .display_name // ""),(.payload.acronym // .payload.short_name // ""),(.payload.entity_type // ""),(.evidence_refs[0].evidence_id // ""),((.evidence_refs[0].source_quote // .raw_text // "") | gsub("[\n\r\t]"; " ") | .[0:220])] | @tsv' data/canonical/entities.jsonl; done
source_evidence_spot_check.result_summary: Selected records have source evidence refs and canonical fields supporting the same institutional identities: MTA Bridges and Tunnels/B&T, Metro-North Commuter Railroad Company/MTA Metro-North Railroad/MNR, and The Long Island Rail Road Company/MTA Long Island Rail Road/LIRR.

forbidden_command_compliance.result: No external/provider-backed commands or profiles/providers were used. No canonicalize, canonicalize-wave, canonicalize-review, campaign dedup, identity-review-run, write, ask, schema-propose, ontology-normalize-run, materialize, export-jsonl, or validate commands were run. Inspection used local deterministic commands only: pwd, sed, rg, jq, sqlite3, test, date, and git status. The only write was data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch112-prep.json.
